general.description: Once a buzzing metropolis of House Yetmr-O'rez, the constant war has left the planet all but unrecognizable. Where there were once abundant Opera Houses and signs of excessive opulence, now there are anti-air defenses set up in ruins, while commandos battle it out in the skeletons of what was once a prosperous society. It is not a place to dawdle in, as the battle attrition has blurred the line between friend and foe, and you never know what some artillery fire or sniper shots may be headed your way.
